entries.title: Flashcard Backlog Growing? Study Sprint Timer | Superfocus
entries.description: 15-min Sprint blocks for Anki/Quizlet. Sustainable review sessions. Free study timer.
entries.painPoints:
Cards pile up. Avoid Anki.
Guilt spiral.
Exam closer.
entries.heroSubtitle: Anki guilt grows with every notification. Without time blocks, review becomes avoidance.
entries.painSolution:
15 min review. Every day.
Timer ends = stop guilt-free.
Backlog shrinks.

entries.title: Essay Due Soon? Pomodoro Writing Timer | Superfocus
entries.description: 25-min writing blocks. Don't edit, just draft. Rain sounds for focus. Free for students.
entries.h1: Essay due in 48 hours. Introduction: unfinished.
entries.painPoints:
Edit before write.
First paragraph forever.
Deadline panic.
entries.recommendedSounds: Rain or lofi for sustained writing
entries.heroSubtitle: You've rewritten the first sentence nine times. Perfectionism is procrastination in academic clothes.
entries.painSolution:
25 min: draft only.
Ugly words count.
Edit in the next block.

entries.title: Language Apps Not Working? Focus Blocks | Superfocus
entries.description: Sprint for drills, Pomodoro for reading/listening. Structure real practice. Free.
entries.h1: Duolingo streak: 400 days. You still can't hold a conversation.
entries.preset: Sprint for drills, Pomodoro for reading/listening
entries.painPoints:
Tap exercises. No immersion.
Streak without skill.
Fluency far away.
entries.recommendedSounds: Lofi or cafe for immersion blocks
entries.heroSubtitle: Streaks measure taps, not fluency. Real practice needs focused immersion blocks you never schedule.
entries.painSolution:
25 min speaking practice.
Timer on. Phone in drawer.
Real blocks, real progress.

entries.title: Can't Finish Reading Assignments? Study Timer | Superfocus
entries.description: Pomodoro reading blocks with scheduled breaks. Finish chapters without burnout. Free.
entries.painPoints:
Read same page twice.
Eyes heavy. Mind gone.
Chapter never ends.
entries.recommendedSounds: Rain or ambient for reading focus
entries.heroSubtitle: You read the same page twice and retain nothing. Without breaks, fatigue wins by page three.
entries.painSolution:
25 min read. 5 min walk.
Fresh eyes. Next section.
Chapters finish.

entries.title: Thesis Stuck? Deep Work Writing Timer | Superfocus
entries.description: 90-min Deep Work or 60-min Marathon for dissertation writing. Structure long sessions. Free.
entries.h1: Your thesis has been "almost done" for eight months.
entries.painPoints:
Chapter half-written. Months.
No protected writing time.
Committee waiting.
entries.recommendedSounds: Rain, lofi, or cafe for deep writing
entries.heroSubtitle: Dissertation writing needs marathon blocks you never protect. Life fills every gap.
entries.painSolution:
90 min every morning.
Same time. Same desk.
Thesis moves daily.

entries.title: Notes Piling Up? Review Focus Timer | Superfocus
entries.description: Sprint blocks for note review and consolidation. Turn notes into knowledge. Free.
entries.h1: Your notes are a graveyard of half-finished lectures.
entries.painPoints:
Notes collect dust.
Never review.
Exams surprise you.
entries.heroSubtitle: Review sessions never happen because consolidation takes focused time you don't allocate.
entries.painSolution:
15 min daily review.
One lecture at a time.
Notes become memory.

entries.title: Course Barely Started? Video Lecture Timer | Superfocus
entries.description: Pomodoro blocks for video lectures. Breaks prevent binge-drifting. Track progress. Free.
entries.h1: You bought the course in January. Module 2 of 47.
entries.painPoints:
Video plays. Brain elsewhere.
Module 2 for months.
Money wasted.
entries.heroSubtitle: Video lectures play while you scroll. "Watching" isn't learning without focused attention.
entries.painSolution:
One module per pomodoro.
Notes required. Phone away.
Course actually finishes.

entries.title: Group Study Always Off-Track? Sync Timer | Superfocus
entries.description: Shared Pomodoro blocks. Everyone focuses together, breaks together. Free study timer.
entries.h1: Group study turned into group chat in twelve minutes.
entries.painPoints:
Open books. Close focus.
Chat takes over.
Exam still coming.
entries.recommendedSounds: Lofi or cafe for group vibe
entries.heroSubtitle: Without shared structure, study sessions become social hours with textbooks as props.
entries.painSolution:
Shared 25-min timer.
Phones away. Break together.
Group actually studies.

entries.title: Stuck on Problem Sets? Math Study Timer | Superfocus
entries.description: Sprint blocks for problem sets. Break between problems. White noise for concentration. Free.
entries.h1: Problem 3 broke you. You've been staring at it for forty minutes.
entries.painPoints:
Stuck on one problem.
Frustration builds.
Set abandoned.
entries.heroSubtitle: Math fatigue is real. Without breaks, frustration replaces problem-solving.
entries.painSolution:
15 min per problem max.
Move on. Return fresh.
Sets get finished.

entries.title: Med School Overwhelm? Long Study Session Timer | Superfocus
entries.description: Pomodoro, Flow, Deep Work for anatomy, pharm, clinical prep. Built for marathon study days. Free.
entries.h1: The stack of material is taller than you. Where do you even start?
entries.recommendedSounds: Lofi or rain for sustained focus
entries.heroSubtitle: Med school volume breaks unstructured study. Without blocks, you drown in content and retain nothing.
entries.painSolution:
One topic. 45 minutes.
Break. Next topic.
Mountain becomes steps.
